series_metadata.series_description: Documents of various types (vouchers, refunds, debit and credit card documentation) relating to and supporting vouchers, overpayments and underpayments to customers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain all records for 5 years from the end of the fiscal period to which they pertain. ; Microform: Retain all records for 5 years from the end of the fiscal period to which they pertain. Effective July 2006, these records are no longer being microfilmed. Eventually all lmicrofilmed records will be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain all records for 5 years from the end of the fiscal period to which they pertain., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
